rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by using only visible identifiers from the current component scope; do not introduce new declarations.
Ensure type consistency in AGREE expressions: numeric variables must be assigned numeric expressions, Boolean variables Boolean expressions.
Do not place implementation-level bindings or subcomponent paths in component type annexes; move valid assignments to implementation scope.
When AGREE reports type errors, trace the root cause to invalid helper declarations or unresolved identifiers on the same line and fix or remove the clause.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reference only visible identifiers from the current scope; avoid package-qualified names unless explicitly imported.
Generated AGREE code should preserve type safety and avoid <error> types by ensuring all expressions have valid types.
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-only features or subcomponent paths; use only visible ports and type-level variables.
Validator diagnostics pointing to unresolved identifiers or type mismatches should be resolved by correcting or removing the offending AGREE clause.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks and must be placed in appropriate scopes (type or implementation).
Helper declarations like `const` and `eq` must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
Assignments in implementation scope should only target existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
Guarantees in component type annexes must relate visible inputs to visible outputs; avoid implementation-specific paths.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new identifiers or types in AGREE contracts that are not present in the AADL model's visible scope.
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes; this leads to scope resolution errors.
Do not attempt to fix type errors by adding placeholder declarations; instead, resolve the root cause of the type mismatch.
Do not assume that package-qualified identifiers are available unless explicitly imported in the AADL model.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
